title: How Much Bitcoin Do You Need To Retire By 2040?
description: Most people are still asking if Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is a good investment. The smarter investors are asking something else entirely: how much of it they need to never work again. Bitcoin has shed over 39% from its October 2025 all-time high of $126,000, trading around $77,000 today. For long-term accumulators, this is a window ... How Much Bitcoin Do You Need To Retire By 2040?
